label: L1 Low (tightened evidence-anchored)
description: Retains L1 priors at evidence-anchored-but-narrow widths. Beta concentration on initial state is doubled relative to MEDIUM so the 2024 baseline draws tightly around regional reporting. Emission-factor triangulars are trimmed to operational-only ranges (drops the life-cycle high tail on e_clean).

notes.e_clean_tightening: upper bound 0.05 reflects operational-emission-only range; excludes life-cycle-inclusive 0.08 tail that inflates the band without representing same physical quantity
notes.fixed_vs_unfixed: All five L1 parameters remain variable but with measurement-grade widths.
